workExperience.description: Leading HR initiatives for a global network of 50,000+ young leaders, enhancing organizational capacity through strategic administrative coordination and youth empowerment initiatives.
Leading institutional initiatives and coordinating various academic and professional development programs.
Representing departmental perspectives in key discussions, facilitating coordination of scholarly activities, strengthening stakeholder communication, and promoting collaborative research culture.

Supported and organized technical and professional development activities. Contributed to volunteering efforts, event coordination, teamwork, and program execution. Managed data organization and documentation.

Exploring security and privacy challenges in Brain-Computer Interface (BCI) systems, focusing on safeguarding neural data such as thoughts, emotions, and decision-making patterns from cyber threats and privacy risks.
Empowering youth voices, driving meaningful initiatives, and creating real social impact through this inspiring platform. Representing campus perspectives and contributing to positive change.
